name: Deliveroo Food Delivery Platform API
what_it_does: Deliveroo food delivery platform API for restaurant operators and enterprise food service businesses to manage menus, orders, and delivery operations through Deliveroo's UK and European food delivery marketplace, enabling real-time order receiving, menu management, POS integration, and operational control across Deliveroo's network in the UK, Ireland, France, Belgium, Italy, Singapore, Hong Kong, UAE, and Kuwait. Enables AI agents to manage menu item for restaurant catalog automation, handle order receipt for kitchen notification automation, access order status for delivery tracking automation, retrieve customer feedback for review management automation, manage POS integration for unified order management automation, handle availability toggle for item and restaurant status automation, access promotional campaign for marketing automation, retrieve analytics dashboard for performance tracking automation, manage multi-location for restaurant chain operations automation, and integrate Deliveroo with POS systems, kitchen display systems, and restaurant management platforms for end-to-end food delivery operations automation.
use_cases: Receiving and acknowledging Deliveroo orders for restaurant POS integration automation agents
Managing menu items, prices, and availability for multi-location restaurant chain automation agents
Tracking order and delivery status for restaurant operations management automation agents
Accessing sales analytics and customer feedback for restaurant performance optimization agents
not_for: Consumer food ordering apps (Deliveroo API is for restaurant/merchant operators, not consumers)
Grocery and non-food retail delivery (Deliveroo is restaurant food delivery focused)
Markets outside Deliveroo's operating countries (UK, IE, FR, BE, IT, SG, HK, AE, KW)
best_when: A restaurant operator, enterprise food service group, or POS vendor wanting AI agents to integrate with Deliveroo's food delivery platform for automated order management, menu updates, and operational control across Deliveroo's UK and European markets.
avoid_when: PARTNER API REQUIRES FORMAL AGREEMENT: Deliveroo restaurant API access requires Deliveroo restaurant partner agreement or technology partner approval; automated self-service API key assumption creates no API access; automated integration requires Deliveroo business development partnership. ORDER ACCEPTANCE HAS TIMEOUT: Deliveroo orders require acknowledgment within timeout (typically 2-3 minutes) or auto-cancel; automated order receipt without rapid acknowledgment creates order cancellation and penalties; automated must process orders in real-time. MENU SYNC HAS PROPAGATION DELAY: Deliveroo menu updates may take 5-30 minutes to propagate to consumer app; automated instant menu change assumption creates stale menu display for consumers; automated must account for menu update propagation delay. MARKET-SPECIFIC FEATURES: Deliveroo features and supported integrations vary by country; automated pan-European uniform feature assumption creates unsupported_feature errors in specific markets; automated must check feature availability per country.

auth.notes: Deliveroo uses OAuth 2.0 for restaurant partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Founded 2013 by Will Shu and Greg Orlowski. NASDAQ:ROO (listed 2021, went private 2024 after Amazon acquisition). Products: Restaurant menu management, order management, POS integration, analytics. SDKs: None public. FCA regulated for payments. GDPR compliant. Operates in UK, IE, FR, BE, IT, SG, HK, AE, KW. 140,000+ restaurant partners. Amazon ownership (2024 acquisition ~$3.9B). Competes with Uber Eats and Just Eat Takeaway.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved restaurant partners; production requires Deliveroo partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Restaurant commission: 25-35% per order; technology integration partners: separate commercial agreement
pricing.notes: London UK. Amazon subsidiary (2024). Commission-based per order. Partnership required for API. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; order webhooks near real-time; menu update APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: ORDER ACCEPTANCE TIMEOUT IS CRITICAL: Deliveroo orders must be acknowledged within 2-3 minutes or auto-cancel with penalty; automated order processing without real-time webhook handler creates cancellation and restaurant rating impact; automated must have immediate webhook consumer for order events

PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED FOR API ACCESS: Deliveroo restaurant API is not self-serve; automated standalone developer integration creates no API access; automated must obtain Deliveroo restaurant partnership or technology partner agreement first

MENU PROPAGATION DELAY: Menu changes submitted via API take 5-30 minutes to appear on consumer app; automated instant menu change expectation creates stale consumer-facing menu during propagation; automated must display in-flight changes status

MARKET-SPECIFIC ENDPOINTS AND FEATURES: Deliveroo API endpoints and available features differ between UK, France, Italy, Singapore etc.; automated region-agnostic single endpoint assumption creates geographic routing errors; automated must use market-specific base URLs

WEBHOOK RETRY MUST BE IDEMPOTENT: Deliveroo retries webhook delivery on failure; automated non-idempotent webhook processing creates duplicate order handling; automated webhook handler must use order_id deduplication
agent_readiness.security_notes: Food delivery platform. FCA, GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. UK/EU. Customer order and payment data. Amazon subsidiary.

security_score_components.security_notes: Food delivery. GDPR, PCI-DSS, FCA. OAuth2. UK/EU. Customer order and delivery data.
